candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line tied to cost of revenues and presented separately alongside the selected COGS row rather than as an indented sub-component within it. Since the selected COGS bucket is 'Cost of goods and services sold', this separate same-level D&A line appears to sit outside the selected bucket and should be added separately later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-related D&A, not COGS-related, so it does not belong in COGS_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS-related D&A row because it is separately disclosed in the operating section and appears outside the chosen COGS row. Did not use any SG&A D&A row here.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line tied to SG&A and shown separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row 'Selling and administrative expenses'. Because it is separately disclosed at the same operating level, it should be added separately later relative to the selected SG&A bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This belongs to cost of revenues / COGS, not SG&A, so it should not be used for XSGA_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A-related D&A row because it is separately presented in the operating section and not already represented by the chosen SG&A parent row for this task. No separate R&D row is present, and XRD is empty, so no special R&D adjustment applies.
